Access All Alternates; presents all alternate forms of a character.
Alternative Fractions; stacked fraction form.
Capitals to Petite Caps; substitutes capitals with petite caps.
Contextual Alternates; applies alternates based on context.
Glyph Composition/Decomposition; ligature or decomposition logic.
Contextual Ligatures; ligatures based on context.

Character Variants; multiple variants of a single character.
Expert Forms; typographic alternatives for some scripts.
Final Glyph on Line Alternates; alternate for final glyph on a line.
Full Widths; replaces with full-width versions.
Historical Forms; obsolete forms of characters.
Historical Ligatures; obsolete ligatures.
Half Widths; replaces with half-width versions.
Initial Forms; special form at word start (Arabic, Syriac).
Isolated Forms; special form outside a word (Arabic, Syriac).

Justification Alternates; alternates for justification.
Localized Forms; preferred form for a script/language.

Medial Form #2; Syriac.
Medial Forms; special form in word middle (Arabic, Syriac).
Mark-to-mark Positioning; position mark to another mark.

Ordinals; replaces with ordinal forms.
Ornaments; decorative alternates for bullet, etc.
Proportional Alternates; repositions monospace chars by width.
Petite Caps; replaces lowercase with petite caps.
Proportional Kana; kana for use with alphabets.
Quarter Widths; replaces with quarter-width versions.

Required Ligatures; ligatures required for correct display.
Required Variation Alternates; special variants for variable fonts.
Stylistic Alternates; alternate forms for a character.

Optical Size; font variant for specific point-size range.
